sourceMovie.title: Turning Red
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Turning Red works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Turning Red clicked for you, Hotel Transylvania: Transformania (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Turning Red?
faq.answer: Try Hotel Transylvania: Transformania, The Boxtrolls, Nimona—each shares DNA with Turning Red while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Turning Red?
faq.answer: Turning Red (2022) is best described as Animation, Family, Comedy, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Turning Red worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
